testcase.name: runScenario

failure.message: Response body value is incorrect expected [RestAssuredRepository] but found [RestAssuredRepository1]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Response body value is incorrect expected [RestAssuredRepository] but found [RestAssuredRepository1] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1590) at org.testng.Assert.assertEqualsImpl(Assert.java:150) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:132) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:656) at com.creatio.crm.framework.api.commons.APICommons.validateResponseBody(APICommons.java:75) at com.creatio.crm.api.stepDefinitions.ApiStepDefinitons.verifyResponseBody(ApiStepDefinitons.java:48) at ✽.Response body should contain "name" with value "RestAssuredRepository"(file:///C:/AutomationTraining/CreatioHybridFramework/APiFeatures/GitApi.feature:10)

testcase.name: runScenario

failure.message: Status Code not matching expected [200] but found [404]
